# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for PRESSROOM. TAB-separated. See PREREQUISITES/30-pressroom.md.
# Dual-engine: at least ONE of typst / pdflatex is needed to produce a PDF.

install-hint: apt install curl  (ComfyUI REST client for handler-comfyui + model-survey)
apt install jq  (JSON wrangling for the ComfyUI harness + journal)
apt install poppler-utils  (rasterise PDF pages → PNG for the design-reviewer; gs/magick are fallbacks)

probe-command: bash -c 'command -v mmdc || exit 1; export PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH="${PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH:-$(command -v chromium||command -v chromium-browser||command -v google-chrome)}"; mmdc -i <(printf "flowchart LR\n a-->b") -o "$(mktemp --suffix=.svg)" >/dev/null 2>&1'

install-hint: ComfyUI server reachable for handler-comfyui (set PRESSROOM_COMFYUI_URL; default http://10.0.1.19:8188)
